title: SR Latch Operation States
description: A diagram showing the four possible input combinations for an SR Latch and its resulting output state (Q and Q̅), illustrating the Set, Reset, Hold, and Invalid conditions.
relationships: NOR Gate 1 uses S and Q̅ to produce Q
NOR Gate 2 uses R and Q to produce Q̅
The outputs Q and Q̅ are cross-coupled back to the inputs of the opposite gate to create feedback
